---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for BAA
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

- Does this feature exist in another tool? Link it.
- Would you be willing to contribute a PR for this?
